## Description

## Checklist before requesting a review

**Pull request**
- [ ] 📝 A good description is added to this PR
- [ ] ⛓️ Related tickets are linked to this PR

**Development dedication**
- [ ] 🧪 Tests are added if applicable (unit, integration, component, e2e)

**Test dedication**
- [ ] ✅ All automated tests are green
- [ ] ✅ All manual/functional tests have succeeded
